_comment: PLACEHOLDER - Draft geometry. Replace with actual lease area and wellpad locations from permit application.

properties.label: Helium Lease Area (Placeholder)
properties.notes: Approximate lease area polygon south of Babbitt, MN. Helium extraction programs typically involve multiple wellpads distributed across a lease area rather than a single concentrated footprint. Polygon is illustrative only.

properties.notes: Illustrative wellpad location within lease area.

properties.notes: Illustrative wellpad location within lease area.

properties.label: Processing / Cryogenic Separation Facility (Placeholder)
properties.notes: Illustrative location for helium liquefaction and processing facility. Typically co-located near wellpads or at a central gathering point. Primary air emission source.
